headline: Live Nation and Ticketmaster had anticompetitive monopoly, US jury finds
summary: A US federal jury has found that Live Nation Entertainment Inc (NYSE:LYV) and its subsidiary Ticketmaster engaged in anticompetitive conduct that contributed to an illegal monopoly in the US market for major concert ticketing and related live-event services. The verdict, delivered by a...

headline: Live Nation Verdict Finds $1.72 Per Ticket Overcharge In Antitrust Case

headline: Live Nation Stock Sinks After Jury Finds It Operated As A Monopoly
summary: Live Nation Entertainment shares sank after a Manhattan jury found the entertainment juggernaut had operated as a monopoly in ticket sales for live events.  The Justice Department and several state attorneys general brought the civil antitrust suit against Live Nation and its subsidiary Ticketmaster over allegations that the two had an illegal monopoly that unfairly drove up prices for consumers.  Live Nation has denied the allegations made in the lawsuit.
